## Description

Brief description of the changes.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change)
- [ ] New skill / command / agent / template
- [ ] Breaking change (may affect existing installations)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `make check` successfully
- [ ] My commits follow Conventional Commits format
- [ ] My commits carry a `Signed-off-by` trailer
- [ ] I have updated AGENTS.md if the directory structure changed
